revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch:{{lc:{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1}}}|.*[ _]from[ _](...).*|%1|plain=0}}}}
|jan=01
|feb=02
|mar=03
|apr=04
|may=05
|jun=06
|jul=07
|aug=08
|sep=09
|oct=10
|nov=11
|dec=12
|00
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation|content=
Example:
;{{Tlx|Monthly clean up category/monthno|jfhiues h from February 2009}}
:{{Monthly clean up category/monthno|jfhiues h from February 2009}}
;{{Tlx|Monthly clean up category/monthno|jfhiues h from X 2009}}
:{{Monthly clean up category/monthno|jfhiues h from X 2009}}
}}</noinclude>

|dec=12
|00
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation|content=
Example:
;{{Tlx|Monthly clean up category/monthno|jfhiues h from February 2009}}
:{{Monthly clean up category/monthno|jfhiues h from February 2009}}
;{{Tlx|Monthly clean up category/monthno|jfhiues h from X 2009}}
:{{Monthly clean up category/monthno|jfhiues h from X 2009}}
}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#switch:{{lc:{{#invoke:string|replace|{{{1}}}|.*[ _]from[ _](...).*|%1|plain=0}}}} |jan=01 |feb=02 |mar=03 |apr=04 |may=05 |jun=06 |jul=07 |aug=08 |sep=09 |oct=10 |nov=11 |dec=12 |00 }}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation|content= Example: ;{{Tlx|Monthly clean up category/monthno|jfhiues h from February 2009}} :{{Monthly clean up category/monthno|jfhiues h from February 2009}} ;{{Tlx|Monthly clean up category/monthno|jfhiues h from X 2009}} :{{Monthly clean up category/monthno|jfhiues h from X 2009}} }}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
